channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GOKUL] Arjunsinh Rajput Acquires 0.010% Shares in Gokul Refoils & Solvent Ltd. Through Open Market
item.description:
Arjunsinh Rajput has acquired 10,000 shares of Gokul Refoils & Solvent Ltd. on March 02, 2026, through the open market. This acquisition increased his total holding to 1.34% from 1.33%. The total equity share capital of the company remains at Rs. 19,79,90,000 divided into 9,89,95,000 shares of Rs. 2/- each. This acquisition also included persons acting in concert (PAC) with the acquirer, namely Mr. Balvantsinh Chandansinh Rajput, Mrs. Bhikhiben Balvantsinh Rajput, Mr. Dharmendrasinh Balvantsinh Rajput, and M/s. Profitline Securities Pvt. Ltd.

  • Arjunsinh Rajput acquires 10,000 shares of Gokul Refoils & Solvent Ltd.
  • The acquisition increases Arjunsinh Rajput's holding to 1.34% from 1.33%.
  • The acquisition is made through the open market.
  • The acquisition also includes persons acting in concert (PAC) with the acquirer.
  • The total equity share capital of the company remains at Rs. 19,79,90,000 divided into 9,89,95,000 shares of Rs. 2/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOKUL REFOILS & SOLVENT LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TATASTEEL] Tata Steel to Invest 11,000 Crore in Jharkhand for Advanced Steel Development
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tata Steel Limited is planning to invest 11,000 crore in Jharkhand for developing advanced grade steel. This is in line with the company's ongoing capital expenditure projects, which cumulatively aggregate to approximately 311,000 crore. These projects are aimed at supporting sustenance, capacity enhancement, operational efficiency, sustainability initiatives, and product mix enrichment. The company will make appropriate disclosures regarding these projects at an appropriate time, in terms of Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The recent downward movement in the company’s share price is due to West Asia tensions, a stronger US dollar, and softer global prices, and does not appear to be linked to any specific news about the company.

  • Tata Steel to invest 11,000 crore in Jharkhand for advanced grade steel
  • Company has ongoing capital expenditure projects aggregating to approximately 311,000 crore
  • Projects aim at supporting sustenance, capacity enhancement, operational efficiency, sustainability initiatives, and product mix enrichment
  • Company will make appropriate disclosures at an appropriate time
  • Recent downward movement in share price due to West Asia tensions, stronger US dollar, and softer global prices

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA STEEL LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [REMIEDEL] WSG Co. Ltd Acquires 5.31% Stake in Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Ltd Through Conversion of Convertible Warrants
item.description:
🔥 Trending

WSG Co. Ltd has disclosed the acquisition of a 5.31% stake in Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Limited. The acquisition was made through the conversion of convertible warrants issued on a preferential basis. The total number of shares acquired was 6,69,226. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition was made on March 4, 2022, and the equity share capital of Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Limited before the said acquisition was Rs. 11,94,52,930 consisting of 1,19,45,293 Equity Shares of face value of Rs. 10/- each fully paid. After the acquisition, the equity share capital of Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Limited was Rs. 12,61,45,190 consisting of 1,26,14,519 Equity Shares of face value of Rs.10/- each fully paid.

  • WSG Co. Ltd acquires 5.31% stake in Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Limited
  • Acquisition made through conversion of convertible warrants issued on preferential basis
  • Total of 6,69,226 shares acquired
  • Acquisition made on March 4, 2022
  • Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Limited equity share capital changed from Rs. 11,94,52,930 to Rs. 12,61,45,190 after acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Limited | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SUNSHIEL] Swarna Malhotra Acquires 0.03% Additional Shares in Sunshield Chemicals Ltd
item.description:
Swarna Malhotra, along with Indus Petrochem Limited, Coppersmith Energies and Project, Sudhir Malhotra, and Jeet Malhotra Private Limited, has acquired 0.03% additional shares in Sunshield Chemicals Ltd. The acquisition was made through the open market. The total share capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 8,79,48,360 before and after the acquisition.

  • Swarna Malhotra and associates acquire 0.03% additional shares in Sunshield Chemicals Ltd
  • The acquisition was made through the open market
  • The total share capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 8,79,48,360 before and after the acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNSHIELD CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SURAJEST] Rahul Jesu Thomas Acquires 0.03% Stake in Suraj Estate Developers Ltd
item.description:
Rahul Jesu Thomas, along with other Persons Acting in Concert (PACs), has acquired 15,253 equity shares of Suraj Estate Developers Ltd. This represents 0.03% of the total voting rights and 0.03% of the total diluted share/voting capital of the company. The acquisition was made through the open market. The total equity share capital of the company remains the same at INR 23,88,66,940/-, but after the conversion of pending 13,30,000 warrants, the fully diluted capital will be INR 24,55,16,940/-.

  • Rahul Jesu Thomas acquires 15,253 equity shares of Suraj Estate Developers Ltd
  • Acquisition represents 0.03% of the total voting rights and 0.03% of the total diluted share/voting capital
  • Acquisition made through the open market
  • Total equity share capital remains the same at INR 23,88,66,940/-
  • Fully diluted capital will be INR 24,55,16,940/- after the conversion of pending 13,30,000 warrants

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Suraj Estate Developers Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PAGEIND] ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund Acquires 2.02% Additional Shares in Page Industries Ltd
item.description:
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund has acquired 3,337 shares of Page Industries Ltd on March 02, 2026, increasing its shareholding by more than 2% compared to the previous disclosure. The Fund, under its various schemes/investment strategies, has carried out net acquisition of 2,24,878 shares of the Company from the last filing. The holding by schemes/investment strategies of the Fund are from an investment perspective and not with the objective of seeking any controlling interest.

  • ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund acquires 3,337 shares of Page Industries Ltd
  • The acquisition increases the Fund's shareholding by more than 2%
  • The Fund has carried out net acquisition of 2,24,878 shares
  • The holding by schemes/investment strategies of the Fund are from an investment perspective
  • The disclosure is as per Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PAGE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [AARTIIND] Aarti Industries to Invest ¥200-250 Crores in Backward Integration Project with a Leading Global Chemical Company
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aarti Industries Ltd. has entered into a material amendment to its existing exclusive long-term supply agreement, deepening its partnership with a Leading Global Chemical Company. The amendment involves a backward integration project where AIL will manufacture a significant share of a key feedstock in-house. This project is expected to enhance EBITDA margins and strengthen AIL's position as an integrated supply solution partner for global chemical leaders.

  • Aarti Industries to invest ¥200-250 crores in a backward integration project
  • Project expected to enhance EBITDA margins over the next 15 years
  • Strengthens AIL’s position as an integrated supply solution partner for global chemical leaders
  • Reinforces India’s growing stature as a preferred manufacturing partner for global majors in advanced chemistries
  • Project to be set up at the same location in Dahej SEZ, Gujarat

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AARTI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [CONSTRONIC] SBICAP Trustee Acquires 10.63% Stake in Constronics Infra Ltd Through Pledge of Equity Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SBICAP Trustee Company Limited, a share pledge trustee for State Bank of India as Lender, has acquired a 10.63% stake in Constronics Infra Limited through the pledge of equity shares. The acquisition took place on 4th March 2026, as per the disclosure made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The total equity shares of Rs.10/- each aggregating to Rs. 15,53,89,400/- were acquired, as per the BSE shareholding pattern as on dated 31-12-2025.

  • SBICAP Trustee acquired 10.63% stake in Constronics Infra Ltd through pledge of equity shares.
  • The acquisition was made on 4th March 2026.
  • The total equity shares acquired amounted to Rs. 15,53,89,400/-.
  • The acquisition was made as per the BSE shareholding pattern as on dated 31-12-2025.
  • State Bank of India was the lender in this acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Constronics Infra Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VERANDA] Pledge and Encumbrance Over Veranda Learning Solutions Shares Released
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd has announced the release of pledge and encumbrance over its equity shares by Catalyst Trusteeship Ltd. The release follows the repayment of non-convertible debentures issued by Veranda Learning Solutions, Veranda XL Learning Solution Private Limited, and Veranda Race Learning Solutions Private Limited. The promoters had pledged a portion of their shareholding in Veranda Learning Solutions, which was released after the repayment of debentures. This move signifies a positive development for the company and its shareholders.

  • Release of pledge and encumbrance over Veranda Learning Solutions shares
  • Repayment of non-convertible debentures by Veranda Learning Solutions, Veranda XL Learning Solution Private Limited, and Veranda Race Learning Solutions Private Limited
  • Pledge of promoters' shareholding in Veranda Learning Solutions released
  • Positive development for the company and its shareholders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [HYPERSOFT] Vertexiq Pte. Ltd.'s Shareholding in Hypersoft Technologies Limited Diluted to 1.18%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Vertexiq Pte. Ltd. has disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 that their shareholding in Hypersoft Technologies Limited has been diluted from 6.15% to 1.18% due to a fresh issue of equity shares on a preferential basis to other allottees. The total equity shares of Hypersoft Technologies Limited held by Vertexiq Pte. Ltd. before the acquisition under consideration were 10,00,000, which have been reduced to 1,18,000 after the acquisition. This dilution has been caused by the preferential allotment of 6,82,00,000 equity shares by the Target Company to other allottees.

  • Vertexiq Pte. Ltd.'s shareholding in Hypersoft Technologies Limited has been diluted from 6.15% to 1.18%.
  • This dilution is due to a fresh issue of equity shares on a preferential basis to other allottees.
  • Before the acquisition under consideration, Vertexiq Pte. Ltd. held 10,00,000 equity shares of Hypersoft Technologies Limited.
  • After the acquisition, Vertexiq Pte. Ltd. now holds 1,18,000 equity shares of Hypersoft Technologies Limited.
  • The dilution has been caused by the preferential allotment of 6,82,00,000 equity shares by the Target Company to other allottees.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hypersoft Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates
